title: Location Filter
description: Filter criteria to narrow location search/lookup results. All specified filters combine with AND logic.

geo.description: Filter locations by geographic proximity or geofence coverage.

distance.description: Filter locations within a maximum distance from a center point (proximity search).

center.description: The center coordinates. If omitted, the user's coarse location hints in the request context MUST be used to derive the center.

max_distance.description: Maximum distance in RFC 7035 distance unit (meters).

geofence_point.description: Filter locations whose geofence contains a specific point (e.g., delivery area check).

hours.description: Filter by operating hours. If both values are specified, behavior is implementation-defined (usually open_at takes precedence or OR logic is enforced).

open_now.description: Only return locations that are currently open.

open_at.description: Only return locations that are open at the specified date and time (RFC 3339) in the location's local time.
